page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual workstation instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 16 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 62.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 3.88 GB per core. For graphics and accelerated compute workloads, it includes a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with a 0.3333 allocation and 8 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance type, and network connectivity is anchored by a 5 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier for its hardware class. In CPU-intensive tasks, it achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 1587.0 and a multi-core score of 12885.0, alongside a Passmark CPU score of 29217.88. The fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU enables specialized capabilities, reflected in a Geekbench ray tracing score of 25626.0 and an image processing score of 12257.0. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 1617.72 GB/sec, dropping to 92.11 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. For lightweight machine learning, the instance processes 135M parameter LLM prompts at 1278.81 tokens/sec, while a larger 7B model runs at 32.87 tokens/sec for prompt processing and 10.13 tokens/sec for text generation.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the fractional GPU allocation allows users to access hardware-accelerated graphics and compute capabilities without the expense of a full dedicated GPU. This resource density makes it a viable option for workloads that require GPU acceleration but do not saturate a full accelerator. The instance is suited for virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI), moderate 3D rendering, image processing, and entry-level AI inference. However, the lack of local storage requires external block storage attachment, which should be factored into the overall architectural design.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8.4xlarge is a KVM-based, GPU-accelerated instance designed for virtual workstation and moderate compute workloads. It features an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 16 dedicated x86_64 physical cores running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 62.0 GB of system memory. The instance integrates a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU providing 8 GB of VRAM, though it lacks local storage and relies on a 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results show solid mid-range performance, with a Passmark CPU score of 29217.88 and a Geekbench ray tracing score of 25626.0. It processes small 135M LLM prompts at 1278.81 tokens/sec and 7B models at 32.87 tokens/sec. This configuration offers a cost-effective entry point for GPU-accelerated tasks, making it highly suitable for virtual desktop hosting, image processing, and lightweight machine learning inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 16 Intel Xeon cores, 62 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 8 GB VRAM, optimized for virtual workstations.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8.4xlarge features 16 Intel Xeon cores, 62 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU for virtual workstation workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual workstation instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and fractional NVIDIA A10 graphics for balanced visual and compute workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores at 2.9 GHz
Includes a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM
Equipped with 62.0 GB of system memory and 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Delivers 25626.0 in Geekbench ray tracing and 12257.0 in image processing
Well-suited for virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI) and light AI inference
Requires external block storage as no local storage is bundled
